author: gb9t
content:
Phase C /loop iter 12: 2 Tier-3 docs (block layer cont'd).

block/request-queue.md (252 lines, 15 REQ / 14 AC, 0 open) — request_queue + gendisk + block_device + flush + sysfs queue-tunables + rq-qos (wbt/ioc/iolatency) + per-request statistics + runtime PM + Independent Access Ranges + BSG SCSI ioctl pass-through + bad-block tracking. /sys/block/<dev>/queue/* + /proc/diskstats + /proc/partitions format-identity. All BLK* ioctl numbers byte-identical.

block/io-schedulers.md (157 lines, 12 REQ / 8 AC, 0 open) — elevator framework + mq-deadline (default SSD) + kyber (latency-targeted) + bfq (Budget Fair Queueing; cgroup-aware; default HDD). Per-scheduler sysfs tunables format-identical. TLA+ model models/block/elevator.tla owned here (mandatory L2; covers all 3 scheduler ordering invariants). Layer-4 Verus opt-in for WF2Q+ fairness theorem.

Total .design/ docs: 63.
